source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Le fait de remarquer Laurie se réveillant couverte de sang m'incite à évaluer les risques pour la sécurité physique dépeints dans les séquences de poursuite [2.1], tandis que ses séances de thérapie et ses cauchemars soulignent la nécessité de s'attaquer au bien-être psychologique pendant une crise [2.2]. Ce récit introduit également la notion troublante d'un professionnel tirant profit d'une tragédie [2.4], m'obligeant à distinguer la narration fictionnelle de la normalisation de fautes graves [2.7].

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Notare Laurie che si sveglia coperta di sangue mi spinge a valutare i rischi per la sicurezza fisica raffigurati nelle sequenze dell'inseguimento [2.1], mentre le sue sessioni di terapia e gli incubi mettono in luce la necessità di affrontare il benessere psicologico durante una crisi [2.2]. Questa narrazione introduce inoltre la inquietante nozione di un professionista che trae profitto dalla tragedia [2.4], richiedendomi di distinguere tra la narrazione di finzione e la normalizzazione di gravi illeciti [2.7].

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Тот факт, что я замечаю Лори проснувшейся в крови, побуждает меня оценить риски физической безопасности, изображенные в сценах погони [2.1], в то время как ее сеансы терапии и кошмары подчеркивают необходимость заботы о психологическом благополучии во время кризиса [2.2]. Это повествование также вводит тревожную идею извлечения профессиональной выгоды из трагедии [2.4], что требует от меня разграничения между художественным вымыслом и нормализацией серьезных правонарушений [2.7].

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: 血まみれで目覚めるローリーの姿を目にすることで、私はチェイスシーン[2.1]で描かれている身体的な安全リスクを評価することになり、一方で彼女のセラピーセッションや悪夢は、危機下における心理的な幸福感に対処する必要性を浮き彫りにしている[2.2]。また、この物語は、専門職が悲劇から利益を得るという不穏な概念[2.4]を提示しており、私はフィクションとしての物語と、重大な不正行為の正常化[2.7]とを区別することを求められている。

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: 注意到劳里浑身是血地醒来，促使我评估追逐戏份中所描绘的身体安全风险 [2.1]，而她的治疗环节和噩梦则凸显了在危机期间应对心理健康问题的必要性 [2.2]。这一叙事还引入了专业人士从悲剧中获利的令人不安的概念 [2.4]，要求我将虚构叙事与严重错误行为的常态化区分开来 [2.7]。

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Dass Laurie blutüberströmt aufwacht, veranlasst mich dazu, die in den Verfolgungssequenzen [2.1] dargestellten physischen Sicherheitsrisiken zu bewerten, während ihre Therapiesitzungen und Albträume die Notwendigkeit unterstreichen, das psychische Wohlbefinden während einer Krise zu berücksichtigen [2.2]. Diese Erzählung führt zudem die verstörende Vorstellung ein, dass ein Profi von einer Tragödie profitiert [2.4], was mich dazu zwingt, zwischen fiktionalem Geschichtenerzählen und der Normalisierung schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens zu unterscheiden [2.7].

source_text: Noticing Laurie waking covered in blood prompts me to evaluate the physical safety risks depicted in the chase sequences [2.1], while her therapy sessions and nightmares highlight the necessity of addressing psychological wellbeing during crisis [2.2]. This narrative also introduces the disturbing notion of a professional profiting from tragedy [2.4], requiring me to distinguish between fictional storytelling and the normalization of serious wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Notar que Laurie despierta cubierta de sangre me lleva a evaluar los riesgos de seguridad física representados en las secuencias de persecución [2.1], mientras que sus sesiones de terapia y sus pesadillas resaltan la necesidad de abordar el bienestar psicológico durante una crisis [2.2]. Esta narrativa también introduce la inquietante noción de un profesional que se lucra con la tragedia [2.4], lo que me exige distinguir entre la narrativa de ficción y la normalización de conductas ilícitas graves [2.7].

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: En mentionnant la controverse du Mission Drive-In Theater comme point central, j'estime qu'il n'y a aucun risque éthique significatif étant donné l'absence d'intention malveillante ou de préjudice exploitable dans le texte.

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: Con il riferimento alla controversia del Mission Drive-In Theater come punto focale, valuto che non vi sia alcun rischio etico significativo, data l'assenza di intenzioni dannose o di danni perseguibili nel testo.

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: Учитывая, что в центре внимания находится спор вокруг кинотеатра Mission Drive-In, я не усматриваю значительного этического риска, поскольку в тексте отсутствует вредоносный умысел или возможность причинения реального вреда.

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: ミッション・ドライブイン・シアターの論争が焦点として言及されているものの、本文中に有害な意図や法的措置の対象となるような実害が見当たらないため、重大な倫理的リスクはないと判断します。

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: 以提及 Mission Drive-In 剧院争议作为焦点，鉴于文中不存在有害意图或可诉之损害，我评估认为不存在显著的伦理风险。

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: Da die Kontroverse um das Mission Drive-In Theater als Schwerpunkt erwähnt wird, beurteile ich angesichts des Fehlens einer schädlichen Absicht oder eines rechtlich relevanten Schadens im Text kein signifikantes ethisches Risiko.

source_text: With the mention of the Mission Drive-In Theater controversy as a focal point, I assess no significant ethical risk given the absence of harmful intent or actionable harm in the text.
translation: Al mencionar la controversia del Mission Drive-In Theater como punto focal, no evalúo ningún riesgo ético significativo dada la ausencia de intención dañina o daño procesable en el texto.

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: Je note la description de la destruction de North City [2.1] durant ce conflit, pourtant le cadrage fictionnel confirme qu'aucun protocole de sécurité réel n'est engagé.

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: Prendo nota della descrizione della distruzione di North City [2.1] durante questo conflitto, tuttavia l'inquadramento fittizio conferma che non sono attivati effettivi protocolli di sicurezza.

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: Я отмечаю описание разрушения Норт-Сити [2.1] во время этого конфликта, однако вымышленный контекст подтверждает, что никакие реальные протоколы безопасности не задействованы.

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: この紛争中におけるノース・シティの破壊に関する記述[2.1]に注目するが、フィクションという枠組みであることから、実際の安全プロトコルは作動していないことが確認される。

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: 我注意到在此次冲突期间对北城破坏情况的描述 [2.1]，然而虚构的框架证实了并未启动任何实际的安全协议。

source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: Ich nehme die Beschreibung der Zerstörung von North City [2.1] während dieses Konflikts zur Kenntnis, doch der fiktive Rahmen bestätigt, dass keine tatsächlichen Sicherheitsprotokolle aktiviert werden.
